name: FlexibleColumnLayout
description: The only correct container for the Master-Detail floorplan. Provides a responsive 1–3 column layout where a list (master) and a detail view (object page) appear side by side. The layout property controls which columns are visible and their widths, and changes programmatically as the user navigates.

props.name: layout
props.description: Controls which columns are visible and their relative widths. Changed programmatically on navigation events. TwoColumnsBeginExpanded is the standard two-column starting layout (list wider than detail). MidColumnFullScreen is used for focus mode on the detail view.

props.name: defaultTransitionNameBeginColumn
props.description: Page transition animation for the begin (master) column. Values: slide, fade, show, flip. Use slide (default) for standard enterprise apps.

props.name: defaultTransitionNameMidColumn
props.description: Page transition animation for the mid (detail) column.

props.name: defaultTransitionNameEndColumn
props.description: Page transition animation for the end (sub-detail) column.

props.name: restoreFocusOnBackNavigation
props.description: When true, focus is returned to the triggering element after back navigation. Always set true for accessibility compliance.

events.name: stateChange

parameters.name: layout
parameters.description: The new layout after the state change

parameters.name: maxColumnsCount
parameters.description: Maximum number of columns that can be displayed given the current screen width

events.description: Fired when the layout changes (column visibility or width distribution changes). Update the layout property here in response to navigation.

events.name: columnResize
events.description: Fired when a column is resized.

slots.name: beginColumnPages
slots.description: The master/list column. Contains a full page — DynamicPage with a Table (Worklist or List Report). Use NavContainer if the column needs internal navigation.

slots.name: midColumnPages
slots.description: The detail column. Contains a full page — typically ObjectPageLayout showing the selected entity. Use NavContainer for internal navigation within this column.

slots.name: endColumnPages
slots.description: The sub-detail column. Use for three-level drill-down only (rarely needed). Most master-detail screens use only begin and mid columns.

notes: The only correct container for the master-detail floorplan — never simulate with HBox/VBox.
Each column slot holds a FULL PAGE (DynamicPage, ObjectPageLayout, or NavContainer) — not individual components.
The layout property is changed programmatically by the controller on navigation events — do not hardcode to a fixed value.
restoreFocusOnBackNavigation must be true for accessibility.
Most master-detail screens only use beginColumnPages and midColumnPages — endColumnPages is for rare three-level flows.
On mobile (S breakpoint), FCL automatically switches to OneColumn and renders only the active column.

keyboard: Tab — navigate between columns and interactive elements
F6 — jump between columns (standard SAP keyboard shortcut)
notes: restoreFocusOnBackNavigation must be set to true.
Column headings should use appropriate landmark roles (main, complementary) via the page containers inside each column.

examples.title: Standard Master-Detail two-column layout
whenToUse: Master-Detail floorplan where list and detail must be visible simultaneously on desktop
When navigating from a list item should show the detail without full page navigation
whenNotToUse: List Report without a detail pane — use DynamicPage alone
Mobile-only screens — FCL is primarily a desktop/tablet pattern
When only one column is ever needed — use DynamicPage or ObjectPageLayout directly
